ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trip */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "start_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the start station */,
  "start_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the start station */,
  "start_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "end_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the end station */,
  "end_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the end station */,
  "end_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the end station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bike was returned to a station */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the trip */,
  "trip_rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the trip */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to initiate the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_trips_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is currently active */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the station is due for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike (e.g., Electric, Standard) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Use, Under Maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance is next due */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips in the analysis period */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average trip duration in seconds */,
  "peak_start_time" TEXT /* Peak start time for trips */,
  "peak_end_time" TEXT /* Peak end time for trips */,
  "most_popular_station_id" INTEGER /* Most popular station based on trips */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the analysis */,
  "peak_usage_day" TEXT /* Day with the highest usage */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance traveled in trips */,
  "user_feedback_score" REAL /* Aggregated user feedback score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather condition record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_weather" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather for the trip */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the usage record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "docked_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently docked */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes available for rent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "total_trips_initiated" INTEGER /* Total number of trips initiated from the station */,
  "total_trips_ended" INTEGER /* Total number of trips ended at the station */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average trip duration from/to the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_usage_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the admin account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., Manager, Analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the admin user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the admin user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)
